descriptionText:
Borderlands 4: Upcoming Content Roadmap

New endgame content is coming soon to Borderlands 4! Raid Boss 2 and a Takedown are on the horizon as free updates for all players, with Bounty Pack 3 dropping at the same time as the Takedown.

Borderlands 4 just hit its big Version 1.5 milestone with the March 26 launch of Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned*, featuring the all-new Vault Hunter C4SH the Rogue and a new map zone, The Whispering Glacier. But we've still got lots more content coming your way, Vault Hunter! Here's a high-level look at what's coming in the next few months:

Upcoming Version Timeline
  • Version 1.6 (April 30): Bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements, including increases to the spawn rates for World Bosses and World Events.
  • Version 1.7 (Late May): Introduces a free Raid Boss 2 encounter, new Pearlescent and Legendary loot, and UVHM Level 7.
  • Version 1.8 (Late June): Delivers a free Takedown and the paid Bounty Pack 3** DLC.

Version 1.6: April 30 Details
Version 1.6 will include bug fixes, more quality-of-life improvements, and adjustments for reported issues. We'll also be continuing to keep a close eye on C4SH the Rogue to ensure his power level is on par with the other Vault Hunters. One quality-of-life improvement we're especially excited to introduce is an increase to World Event and World Boss spawns, which will give you more opportunities for exciting battles as you traverse Kairos or farm your most-wanted dedicated drops. We'll share a full list of Version 1.6 changes when it goes live on April 30.

Version 1.7: Free Raid Boss 2 (Late May)
Borderlands 4's first raid boss, Bloomreaper the Invincible, was added as a free endgame update back in December. In late May, we're bringing you another new, free Raid Boss encounter! Conquer Raid Boss 2 for a chance at scoring:
  • 1 new Pearlescent weapon
  • 4 new Legendary items
  • 5 new Class Mods (one per Vault Hunter)
For those hardcore Vault Hunters pushing the highest levels, Version 1.7 will fittingly add UVHM Level 7 to further test your skills and builds, compounding the endgame difficulty even further.

Version 1.8: Free Takedown & Paid Bounty Pack 3** (Late June)
By the end of June, Version 1.8 will introduce the free Takedown and the paid Bounty Pack 3 DLC on the very same day! The Takedown will be Borderlands 4's most extreme endgame challenge yet. Overcoming the deadly mobs, midway miniboss, and final boss will grant:
  • 1 new Pearlescent weapon
  • 9 new Legendary items
  • Challenge Cosmetics: 3 Weapon Skins, 1 Global Vault Hunter Skin, and 1 ECHO-4 Drone Skin.
Bounty Pack 3 is paid content included with Deluxe/Super Deluxe editions, expanding the narrative on Kairos with:
  • New mission with three minibosses and a final boss
  • New Legendary & Pearlescent gear
  • Vault Card with 24 cosmetics and 4 pieces of rerollable gear
  • 1 new Vehicle, 1 Vault Hunter Skin, and 1 ECHO-4 Drone Skin

Even More Content & Features
As always, we'll keep rolling out Weekly Updates featuring refreshed Activities, balance tweaks, and performance fixes. Other features currently in development:
  • Shared Character Progression Toggle: Version 1.5 introduced Shared Progression; we are adding a way to toggle it off for those who want a completely clean slate on a new character.
  • Cross-Platform Saves: We remain committed to giving you a way to seamlessly continue your Vault Hunter's adventures on any platform.

*Story Pack 1 is included with Super Deluxe Edition and the Vault Hunter Pack. **Bounty Packs 2-5 are included with the Bounty Pack Bundle and Deluxe/Super Deluxe Editions. Base game required.

Borderlands 4: 2026 Roadmap Overview

As we kick off 2026, we're excited to share what's coming to Kairos. This year, we’re focusing on major content drops while continuing to refine the base game with features like cross-save and shared account progression.
Our first Major Update of the year is now live, featuring the highly requested Photo Mode, plus balance changes and refinements.

Bounty Pack 2 & Story Pack 1
  • Bounty Pack 2: Legend of the Stone Demon (February): Includes a new mission, Legendary loot, and a themed Vault Card. Introduces Pearlescent Gear—a new rarity tier superior to Legendary.
  • Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned (March): Introduces a brand-new region focused on cosmic horror, new story missions, and the first new Vault Hunter: C4SH.
  • New Vault Hunter: C4SH: A former casino dealer bot turned drifter using probability-breaking Action Skills.

Upcoming Features & Endgame
  • Level Cap Increase: Future updates will increase the level cap for all players.
  • Cross-Platform Saves & Shared Progression: Seamlessly play on any platform and share SDU/Map progress across characters.
  • New Raid Boss & Takedown (Q2 2026): Formidable endgame challenges with top-tier loot.

Update Schedule
  • Major Updates (Monthly): New content, large balance changes, and performance fixes.
  • Minor Updates (Weekly): Small fixes and refreshes for Maurice’s Black Market and Boss activities.

Support & Community
  • If you're encountering issues, please contact 2K Support.
